moments.title: World Cup Semi-Finals & Final
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-finals are being played today, with England facing Argentina, leading up to the grand final on Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Semi-final hype
angles.copy: It's Semi-Final day! England vs Argentina for a spot in the World Cup Final. Who are you backing to make it through? #WorldCup2026

angles.name: Final countdown
angles.copy: Just days until the World Cup Final! Will it be England, or will a new champion be crowned? Get ready for Sunday's showdown. #FIFAWorldCup

moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games officially kick off in Glasgow on July 23rd, bringing 11 days of world-class sporting action to Scotland.

angles.name: Games countdown
angles.copy: The countdown is on! Glasgow is set to host the Commonwealth Games from July 23rd. Who's excited for 11 days of incredible sport?

angles.name: Scottish spotlight
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready? The Commonwealth Games begin next week, putting our city on the global sporting stage! What events are you looking forward to?

moments.title: The Open Championship
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship continues at Royal Birkdale in Southport, with the final rounds taking place this weekend.

angles.name: Golf action
angles.copy: It's moving day at The Open! Who's going to make a charge up the leaderboard at Royal Birkdale this weekend?

angles.name: Major golf weekend
angles.copy: The Open Championship is in full swing at Royal Birkdale. Tune in this weekend to see who lifts the Claret Jug!

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The Novuna London Athletics Meet, one of the biggest one-day athletics events, returns to the London Stadium on July 18th.

angles.name: Track & Field hype
angles.copy: World-class athletics comes to London this Saturday! The London Stadium hosts the Novuna London Athletics Meet. Who's got tickets?

angles.name: One-day spectacular
angles.copy: Get ready for a day of incredible track and field! The London Athletics Meet brings global superstars to the capital this weekend.

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival is underway in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, celebrating music and culture until July 18th.

angles.name: Celtic vibes
angles.copy: Live from the Outer Hebrides! The Hebridean Celtic Festival is bringing incredible music and culture to Stornoway all weekend. Who's there?

angles.name: Festival fun
angles.copy: If you're looking for a unique festival experience, the Hebridean Celtic Festival is happening right now in Scotland!

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's biggest music festival, Splendour, takes place this weekend (July 18-19) at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park, featuring Snow Patrol and The Wombats.

angles.name: Nottingham festival
angles.copy: Splendour Festival is back this weekend in Nottingham! Who's excited to see Snow Patrol and The Wombats at Wollaton Hall?

angles.name: Weekend music
angles.copy: Got your Splendour tickets? Snow Patrol and The Wombats are headlining Nottingham's biggest festival this Saturday and Sunday!

moments.title: Caribou & Gary Numan in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Electronic artist Caribou plays The Galvanizers Yard at SWG3 and synth-rock icon Gary Numan performs at Queen's Park Arena in Glasgow on Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Glasgow music night
angles.copy: Big night for music in Glasgow this Friday! Caribou at SWG3 and the legendary Gary Numan at Queen's Park Arena. Where are you heading?

angles.name: Electronic & Synth
angles.copy: Caribou brings the beats to Glasgow this Friday! Get ready for an electrifying night at SWG3.

angles.name: Numan in Scotland
angles.copy: The iconic Gary Numan live in Glasgow this Friday! Don't miss the synth-rock pioneer at Queen's Park Arena.

moments.title: Britallica - Britney Spears Metal Tribute
moments.blurb: Britallica, a Britney Spears metal tribute band, performs at Exeter Phoenix on Saturday, July 18th, offering a unique musical mash-up.

angles.name: Exeter's unique gig
angles.copy: This Saturday, prepare for something different! Britallica brings their Britney Spears metal tribute to Exeter Phoenix. Ready to rock?

angles.name: Unexpected tribute
angles.copy: Britney Spears meets metal? Britallica is playing Exeter Phoenix this Saturday for a tribute night you won't forget!

moments.title: UK Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The latest UK Official Singles Chart (July 10, 2026) sees World Cup anthems 'Dai Dai' by Shakira & Burna Boy and 'Three Lions' climbing, alongside new hits from Olivia Rodrigo and Harry Styles.

angles.name: Chart climbers
angles.copy: The World Cup effect! Shakira & Burna Boy's 'Dai Dai' and 'Three Lions' are soaring up the UK Singles Chart. What's your current favourite?

angles.name: New chart entries
angles.copy: Olivia Rodrigo and Harry Styles are dominating the latest UK Singles Chart. What tracks are you streaming on repeat right now?

moments.title: Ann Droid on BBC One
moments.blurb: Diane Morgan stars in 'Ann Droid', a new BBC One comedy about a robot companion for the elderly, premiering Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: New comedy alert
angles.copy: Diane Morgan as a robot companion? Sign us up! New comedy 'Ann Droid' starts this Friday on BBC One. Get ready to laugh!

angles.name: Friday night TV
angles.copy: Your Friday night TV just got funnier! Diane Morgan's new show 'Ann Droid' premieres this week on BBC One. Will you be watching?

moments.title: The Dark on ITV
moments.blurb: The new six-part murder drama 'The Dark', set in the Scottish countryside and starring Laura Donnelly, is currently airing on ITV.

angles.name: Gripping drama
angles.copy: If you're hooked on 'The Dark' on ITV, you're not alone! This Scottish murder drama is keeping everyone on the edge of their seats.

angles.name: Scottish thriller
angles.copy: Set in the stunning (and sometimes sinister) Scottish countryside, 'The Dark' on ITV is the crime thriller everyone's talking about. Are you watching?

moments.title: Heartstopper Forever on Netflix
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated new drama 'Heartstopper Forever' is set to premiere globally on Netflix this Friday, July 17th.

angles.name: Heartstopper returns
angles.copy: Get ready, Heartstopper fans! 'Heartstopper Forever' drops this Friday on Netflix. Who's clearing their schedule for a binge-watch?

angles.name: New Netflix drama
angles.copy: The wait is almost over! 'Heartstopper Forever' arrives on Netflix this Friday. Prepare for all the feels!

moments.title: The Crow Girl Season 2
moments.blurb: Season 2 of the mystery thriller 'The Crow Girl', starring Welsh actress Eve Myles, premieres on Paramount+ on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Welsh talent on screen
angles.copy: Our very own Eve Myles returns in 'The Crow Girl' Season 2, hitting Paramount+ this Monday! Who's ready for more gripping mystery?

angles.name: Mystery thriller returns
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The acclaimed thriller 'The Crow Girl' is back for Season 2 on Paramount+ this Monday. Don't miss it!

moments.title: Carlos Santana turns 79
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring brilliance of Carlos Santana, who turns 79 on Monday! What's your favourite Santana track?

angles.name: Rock icon
angles.copy: Happy almost-birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana, turning 79 this Monday! His guitar work is timeless. #Santana

moments.title: Don Henley turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder and drumming legend Don Henley celebrates his 79th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the iconic Don Henley, drummer and vocalist for the Eagles, this Wednesday! What's your favourite Eagles song?

angles.name: Classic rock voice
angles.copy: Don Henley of the Eagles turns 79 this Wednesday! A true voice of classic rock. Celebrate with his greatest hits!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday on July 24th.

angles.name: Pop icon
angles.copy: Happy 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday! Celebrate with her incredible career of hits. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Dance floor diva
angles.copy: Get ready to dance! Jennifer Lopez turns 57 this Friday. We're blasting her biggest bangers to celebrate!

moments.title: UK Summer Weather
moments.blurb: The UK is experiencing warm summer weather, perfect for outdoor activities and enjoying the long evenings.

angles.name: Enjoying summer
angles.copy: Sunshine and long evenings! How are you making the most of this beautiful summer weather across the UK?

angles.name: Cool down
angles.copy: It's a warm one today! Remember to stay hydrated and find ways to keep cool while enjoying the UK summer.
